title: Lightdash release-safety upgrade overrides
description: Maintainer-authored, committed upgrade-path overrides consumed by scripts/gen-release-safety.ts to populate the marker's `upgrade` block (PROD-8359, P4). Version-keyed: an entry is inert for every release except the one it names. See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-29-prod-8359-release-safety-marker-design.md

versions.description: Per-release overrides keyed by exact release version (e.g. "0.3300.0"). A version-specific field wins over `default`.

minPreviousVersion.description: Oldest previous version that may upgrade directly to this release; null = no floor.

requiredStop.description: True if operators MUST land on this release before upgrading further (a required stop).

note.description: Operator-facing explanation; set this whenever requiredStop is true.
